reason: cuda-toolkit-config-common 12.9.79 — fix requires CUDA 13 major bump (>=0:13.0.48-1) which cascades through TFS binary compatibility, cuDNN, and the parallel TF 2.21 training PR. CUDA 12.9 is pinned to match the AL2023 base image; CUDA 13 currency tracked separately.
